title: More Nonsense Limerick 51
content:
There was an old person of Filey,
    Of whom his acquaintance spoke highly;
    He danced perfectly well,
    To the sound of a bell,
    And delighted the people of Filey.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 51" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
